claims.quote: The Department of Medicine, part of Emory University's School of Medicine, promotes excellence in education, patient care, and clinical and basic research.
claims.claimText: Source is Emory University School of Medicine (medical-school scope), not Emory University Hospital (the named institution); no campus-applicability proof present.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Scope conflict, not a tiered opportunity claim.
claims.limitations: Cannot attribute any USCE claim to Emory University Hospital from this med-school-domain page.

claims.quote: The five-month Discovery Phase of the medical curriculum provides you with the opportunity to conduct a hypothesis-driven research project while working closely with a faculty mentor.
claims.claimText: Five-month Discovery Phase of the Emory medical curriculum offers a hypothesis-driven research project with a faculty mentor.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Research training embedded in medical curriculum addresses pre-residency medical students.
claims.limitations: Med-school scope (med.emory.edu) not hospital-specific; Discovery Phase appears to be for Emory's own medical curriculum students, not visiting students.
claims.visibilityRationale: P102-0C deterministic detection; needs model A1/A2 reader (P102-0D) for PUBLIC_SAFE_USCE promotion

claims.quote: A variety of research training opportunities are available at Emory for medical and PhD students, postdocs, and junior faculty.
claims.claimText: Research training opportunities at Emory are available to medical and PhD students, postdocs, and junior faculty.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Audience explicitly includes medical students (pre-residency tier) alongside post-trainee populations.
claims.limitations: Does not specify whether 'medical students' includes visiting / external / IMG students. Med-school scope.
claims.visibilityRationale: P102-0C deterministic detection; needs model A1/A2 reader (P102-0D) for PUBLIC_SAFE_USCE promotion

claims.quote: The Emory MD/PhD Program combines rigorous preparation in clinical medicine in the School of Medicine with interdisciplinary training in the basic and social sciences in Emory’s Laney Graduate School.
claims.claimText: Emory MD/PhD Program combines clinical medicine training with interdisciplinary basic and social science training.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: MD/PhD is a degree-program admissions track, not a public USCE rotation; captured as future-lane signal.
claims.visibilityRationale: A3 downgrade: MD/PhD matriculating program from RESEARCH_PAGE source; not USCE/observership.

claims.quote: Emory School of Medicine SimulationThis interdisciplinary resource works with Emory partners to provide patient simulators and other high-tech equipment for hands-on clinical care training, and standardized patients for simulated patient encounters.
claims.claimText: Emory SOM Simulation provides patient simulators and standardized-patient encounters for hands-on clinical care training.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured CME, residencies, and postdoc but skipped the Simulation paragraph, which is a distinct educational resource line in the page body.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Simulation training serves medical students (pre-residency) and trainees — Tier 1 educational resource, not direct USCE.
claims.limitations: Not a clinical observership/elective; simulated patient encounters are not USCE.
